entry.title: How to define a selection limit to a Macro Table in SAPUI5 FPM Odata v4
entry.content:
Hi, experts!

I have a freestyle SAPUI5 FPM app consuming an odata v4 service provided by a CAP Project.
I need to set the selection limit for the macro table which the data is listed, because the default value is too low for the customer.

I did some debugging and found the property selectionLimit, but change it did not take any effect to this message above.

At the init method of my controller, I set the selectionLimit like this:
oMacroTable.getTableDefinition().control.selectionLimit = 5000

But when I try to select all records again, the alert message shows as well.

That is the xml code I'm using for the macro table:

Do you know how to properly set the selection limit for a macro table?

Best Regards

entry.title: Problems with empty date fields in Smarttable
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to display a table with start/enddate and start/endtime in an Smarttable. Unfortunately it is possible that the enddate and the endtime are not set yet. In this case the fields are empty.

The Smarttable is not showing any data whatsoever. Not even other rows with filled enddate/endtime. As soon as i dont display the fields it shows everything again.

The app is a Fiori Elements app with a custompage, where the smartable is implemented. It contains the ChildEntities of the Main Project.

<f:DynamicPage id="dynamicPage" fitContent="true">
                    <f:header>
                        <f:DynamicPageHeader>
                            <bar:SmartFilterBar
                                id="smartFilterBar"
                                entitySet="EntitySet">
                                <bar:controlConfiguration>
                                    <bar:ControlConfiguration
                                        key="StartDate"
                                        visibleInAdvancedArea="true"
                                        conditionType="{
                                            module: 'sap.ui.comp.config.condition.DateRangeType',
                                            defaultOperation: 'TODAY'
                                        }"
                                    />
                                </bar:controlConfiguration> 
                                <bar:layoutData>
                                    <FlexItemData shrinkFactor="0"/>
                                </bar:layoutData> 
                            </bar:SmartFilterBar>
                        </f:DynamicPageHeader>
                    </f:header>
                    <f:content > 
                        <smartTable:SmartTable
                            id ="SmartTable"
                            entitySet="EntitySet"
                            smartFilterId="smartFilterBar"
                            tableType="ResponsiveTable"
                            enableExport="true"
                            beforeExport="onBeforeExport"
                            useVariantManagement="true"
                            useTablePersonalisation="true"
                            header="{i18n>JournalTable}"
                            showRowCount="true"
                            persistencyKey="SmartTableAnalytical_Explored"
                            enableAutoBinding="true"
                            demandPopin="true"
                            class="sapUiResponsiveContentPadding"
                            enableAutoColumnWidth="true"
                            tableBindingPath="to_Child"
                            beforeRebindTable="onBeforeRebindTable"
                            initiallyVisibleFields="WBSElement,CategoryName,Trade,Workpackage,Workstep,StatusName,Partner,StartDate,StartTime,EndDate,EndTime,PMUser,WorkType,CommentText,Finding,Organisation,WorkRessource,hasAttachments"
                            requestAtLeastFields="ProjectInternalID,HeadID,PositionID"
                        >
                        </smartTable:SmartTable>
                       
                    </f:content>
                </f:DynamicPage>

One solution is to cast the fields into character fields in the cds-View. Then the smarttable has no problems with initial fields. But i have to convert date and time according to the conventions of the User.

Does anyone has a similiar usecase? Do i overlook something simple?

Thank you for your help.

Best Regards Maximilian

entry.title: Deprecated API call of 'sap.ushell.CrossApplicationNavigation.createEmptyAppState'
entry.content:
Does anyone know how to implement the successor of CrossApplicationNavigation.createEmptyAppState?  It seems it has been deprecated (sap.ushell.services.CrossApplicationNavigation - API Reference - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK) and replaced by  (sap.ushell.services.Navigation - API Reference - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK).  The error message I got from the console:  "Deprecated API call of 'sap.ushell.CrossApplicationNavigation.createEmptyAppState'. Please use 'createEmptyAppStateAsync' instead - sap.ushell.services.CrossApplicationNavigation"

When I tried to use it the deprecated method:

var xnavservice = sap.ushell && sap.ushell.Container && sap.ushell.Container.getService && sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation");
           
//deprecated
var oAppState = xnavservice.createEmptyAppState(this.getOwnerComponent());
oAppState.setData(this.getView().getModel().oData);
oAppState.save();
 
Resulting in console error:  "Deprecated API call of 'sap.ushell.CrossApplicationNavigation.createEmptyAppState'. Please use 'createEmptyAppStateAsync' instead - sap.ushell.services.CrossApplicationNavigation"
 
 //Use the createEmptyAppStateAsync instead...
 var oAppState = xnavservice.createEmptyAppStateAsync(this.getOwnerComponent());
//oAppState returns promise with "pending" - not sure how to use it.  If anyone has an example would be great
 
oAppState.setData(this.getView().getModel().oData);
//this is where it errors out as setData isn't a function of oAppState.
 
Ultimately, I'm trying to save the AppState so then I can come back to it when I'm doing Cross Application Navigation.

entry.title: Namespaces are not supported for this language version (failed BAS -> on-premise deployment)
entry.content:
We are unable to deploy UI apps within our partner namespace from Business Application Studio to on-premise S/4 HANA 2023 (FPS02) instance (ie. packages set to ABAP for Cloud Development). The resulting BAS deployment error is: "Namespaces are not supported for this language version".

 

# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://sap.github.io/ui5-tooling/schema/ui5.yaml.json

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: cust.packandship
type: application
builder:
  resources:
    excludes:
      - /test/**
      - /localService/**
  customTasks:
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        log: 5
        target:
          destination: ABC
          url: https://systemurl.local:443
          scp: false
        app:
          name: /CUST/UI_PACKSHIP
          package: /CUST/_UI_PACKSHIP
          transport: ABCK900xxxx
        exclude:
          - /test/

 

I have found that the deployment runs successfully if I direct the deployment to a tier 2 package set the Standard ABAP. Why are we limited to deploying partner namesapce UI components into Standard ABAP Tier 2 packages? This is counter productive towards the SAP's movement shift partner development towards Clean Core best practices.    

 

 

 

 

 

__PRESENT

entry.title: remove the navigation arrow button from the macros based table inside a dialog
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm using macro table of type responsive table inside a dialog. But I'm seeing this navigation arrow at the rightmost end of all the rows.

I am not using the rowpress event. is there any way to remove it through controller or any annotation in the presentation variant? I'm not able to find any property on API reference page which can be used to disable it.

fragment definition:

<core:FragmentDefinition
    xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" 
    xmlns:table="sap.ui.table" xmlns:macrosTable="sap.fe.macros.table" xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros">
    <Dialog id="changesDialogTable">
        <content>
            <macrosTable:Table
                id="changesTable"
                metaPath="/PurchaseOrderChanges/@UI.PresentationVariant"     
                readOnly="true"
                personalization ="false"
                isSearchable = "false"
                enableAutoColumnWidth = "true"
                type ="ResponsiveTable"
                disableCopyToClipboard = "true"
                beforeRebindTable=".tableRefreshed"> 
            </macrosTable:Table>
        </content>
        <beginButton>
            <Button id="closeButtonTable" text="{i18n>close}" press="onCloseChangesDialogTable" />
        </beginButton>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>


Could anyone help please.

Thank you,
Keval

entry.title: SAP BODS Cloud Migration
entry.content:
Hi,

We are planning to migrate our BODS application with Lift and Shift approach from;

Current Environment:

  • Operating Model: On-Premises
  • Operating System: Windows Server 2019
  • BI Application: SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.2 Support Pack 9
  • Oracle Database: Oracle Database 19c Standard Edition 2 Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production

Target Environment:

  1. Operating Model: Azure Cloud
  2. Operating System: Window 2019
  3. Data Service: Information Platform Service (IPS) 4.3 SP04
  4. Database: Oracle Database 19c Standard Edition 2 Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production   
  5. There are other application files and scripts are being managed and stored in the BODS servers, which are required to run their processes

Please help to understand how to proceed and what are the pros and cons of this approach.

Thanks,

Muhammad Hameedullah

entry.title: manifest file has two different application configured but only one tile appears in Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hi All,

Background: I have one sap ui5 application which launches two different application based on custom parameter.

Requirement : I want this application to be deployed in SAP Build Workzone as two separate applications.
There are two crossNavigation added to the manifest.json file of the project. 

Issue: However only one project shows up in SAP Build Workzone. Can someone suggest how to fix this.

"crossNavigation": {
"inbounds": {
"atom-ui-claims-inbound": {
"signature": {
"parameters": {
"appmode":{
"defaultValue": {
"value" : "claims"
}
}
},
"additionalParameters": "allowed"
},
"semanticObject": "Claims",
"action": "manage",
"title": "Claim Management",
"subTitle": "3.0",
"icon": "sap-icon://request"
},
"atom-ui-claimfinance-inbound": {
"signature": {
"parameters": { },
"additionalParameters": "allowed"
},
"semanticObject": "ClaimsBulk",
"action": "manage",
"title": "Claim Processing",
"subTitle": "Finance",
"icon": "sap-icon://my-sales-order"
}
}
}

entry.title: How to create custom catalogs and target mapping
entry.content:
Is there any detailed steps on how we can create a custom catalog and group as well as the target mapping?

addition to our query, may we know how to delete the published variant in UI?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: UI5 Dropdown broken in CAP/Fiori preview – expands fullscreen instead of compact popup
entry.content:
Hey Everyone

Recently I had problems with my dropdown-lists on my local CAP project. They expand to full-screen and I have no idea why. I tried searching everywhere for clues, like removing the sandbox-launchpad plugin, reinstalling my node modules etc etc. Nothing seems to be working.

Did anybody else have similar issue and were you able to fix it? I even tried cloning other cap-projects and the same thing happend again, so it must be something on my local system..

I'd appreciate you reaching out if you know how to fix it! 😁

Thanks in advance

Michael

entry.title: Label in F4 is not getting displayed for the fiori local annotations
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a value help using local annotations for my custom fiori application. Below is the code 

            <Annotations Target="Odata.PO_Self_Service_HomePage/POStatus">
                <Annotation Term="Common.ValueList">
                    <Record Type="Common.ValueListType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Parameters">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterInOut">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="POStatus" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="LocalDataProperty" PropertyPath="POStatus" />
                                </Record>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="Description"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="CollectionPath" String="ZPOStatusValueHelp" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="SearchSupported" Bool="true" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="valueHelp" />
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
 
Issue is i dont see the PO status label in the output but strangely i could see the description. 

But the same i could see in the top to search. what is that i am missing here ? 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio - modules not recognized...
entry.content:
Hello.

I’m facing a similar issue to yours. My CDS files have working autocompletion and syntax checking, but when I create a SAPUI5 project with TypeScript inside the CAP project, the syntax checking and autocompletion in my SAPUI5 Project no longer work. I’ve also tried creating a new Dev Space, but the problem persists.

Have you found a solution yet?

entry.title: How to create an IM PI document for a SLOC which is total empty?
entry.content:
Hi 

I would like to create an IM PI document in MI01 transaction but the SLOC is total empty right now and I cannot create a blank document becasue of error: Document does not contain any items. And if I enter the material then another error: Item 001: No batches that can be included in phys. inv. exist for xxxx . 

My user case is, we found physically a new material in a Storage location which material does not existed before on that SLOC and the SLOC is full empty now (no any other material exist on SLOC) so we want to increase the stock of the found material but system does not allow to add just 1 new material to an empty SLOC. How can we do the inventory?

Thanks,
Istvan

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud compatibility with SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Is there any feature support matrix for SAP Analytics Cloud functionality for Datasphere (direct consume for analytics model)?

We have done few testing and found that nice feature such Compass, Predictive Scenario, In chart time series forecast and smart insight is not working.

Thanks for all help.

entry.title: Fiori Change Document Reuse Component not found after Deployment in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have an interesting problem.

We developed a Fiori app using Business Application Studio (BAS) and integrated the Reuse Component for Change Documents following the provided instructions (How to Use the Fiori Reuse Library for Change Document Solution | SAP Help Portal)

The app runs perfectly in BAS. However, after deploying it to the Public Cloud (as per the tutorial Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials), the app starts but fails as soon as a selection is triggered, showing the error: "

Errorfailed to load 'sap/nw/core/changedocs/lib/reuse/changedocscomponent/Component.js' from https://ui5.sap.com/1.130.8/resources/sap/nw/core/changedocs/lib/reuse/changedocscomponent/Component.js: script load error"

What are we missing?

We also noticed that in BAS, the .js files are accessed locally, whereas in the Public Cloud, they seem to be fetched directly from the internet. Could this be related to our issue?

BAS:

Deployed in Public Cloud:

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAPUI5 

SAP Fiori 

@kaidehmann -> Danke!

entry.title: Convert a Smart Table Column Data to clickable actions in Fiori Elements Custom Card
entry.content:
HI,

I have a custom card in SAP FIORI Overview page . 

Card has a smart table with columns rendered via CDS view where in one of the column i need to convert the text to clickable actions.

My data from CDS looks like "Google,SAP" or "SAP" .

How can i convert these data to clickable actions .

My table extension code looks like below 

  onInit:function{
oSmartTable = this.getView().byId('LineItemsSmartTable');
                    oSmartTable.attachBeforeRebindTable(this.extendColumn.bind(this));
}
extentColumn:function(){
const oMultiStatusColumn = aColumns.find((col) => col.getLabel().getText() === "MultiStatusColumn");
var oMultiStatusColumnTemplate = new sap.m.HBox({
                        items: {
                            path: "MultiStatusColumn",
                            formatter: this.formatLinks.bind(this)
                        }
                    });
                 oMultiStatusColumn.setTemplate(oMultiStatusColumnTemplate);
}
formatLinks: function (sValue) {
                    if (!sValue) return [];
                    var aValues = sValue.split(", "); 
                    return aValues.map(function (sText) {
                        return new sap.m.Link({
                            text: sText,
                            press: function () {
                                sap.m.URLHelper.redirect(sText, true); 
                            }
                        });
                    });
                }
}

 This code throws either a missing template error or a List Binding error .

Any Suggestions or workaround for this scenario ? 

Thanks,

Abhi

entry.title: How to call Function Import of external OData for fetching PDF in CAPM application
entry.content:
I am developing CAP app on BAS to fetch PDF file of billing document. I am consuming standard OData API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV in CAPM, I am able to get entities data but on using function Import GetPDF, I always get undefined even though terminal shows no error. Please help.

this is the edmx definition of function import.

 

<FunctionImport Name="GetPDF" ReturnType="API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.GetPDFResult" m:HttpMethod="GET" sap:action-for="API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.A_BillingDocumentType"><Parameter Name="BillingDocument" Type="Edm.String" Mode="In" MaxLength="11000"/></FunctionImport>
 
Below is my code
service.js
=======
 
const cds = require('@sap/cds');
 
module.exports = cds.service.impl(async function () {
    const {BD} = this.entities;
    const BDService = await cds.connect.to('API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV');
 
    this.on('READ', 'BD', async (req) => {
        return await BDService.run(SELECT.from(BD)); // Successfully connects and returns data from entity
    });

    this.on('getFile',  async (req) => {
        const {docNo} = req.data;
        const parameters = { BillingDocument: docNo };
        const headers = { "Accept" : "application/json"  };
 
        const result = await BDService.send("GetPDF",parameters,headers);
        return result; // undefined sadly, expecting binary pdf string, directly calling api loads PDF data
    });
 
});
 
service.cds
=========
 
using {API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV} from './external/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.csn';

service BillingDocumentService {

  entity BD as select from API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.A_BillingDocument;

  function getFile(docNo : String) returns API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.GetPDFResult;
 
}

I have referred below github for using function import

https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-extension-s4-material-availability/blob/main/srv/service.js

Below is documentation

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/03c04db2a7434731b7fe21dca77440da/990f1ce2078f42e4b593d6d060966bd8.html

entry.title: UI5 App Offline Navigation Issue – Best Approach?
entry.content:
Hey! 
I have developed a UI5 application with two views (main and details). My goal is to use the app in offline mode and still be able to navigate between the views without requiring a network connection.

i tried loading using sap.ui.view and i saw the view and controller loaded, but when navigating offline i still see a fetch trying to get the view even though the files are already fetched! 
Also i tried other ideas but that was the closest i think

Got any ideas? Maybe register the fetched view or connect it to the router so it won’t try to fetch the view? 
thanks!

entry.title: Best approach to handle a really large dataset for a SAP UI5 Table using pagination?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm working on a SAPUI5 application where I need to display a very large dataset — around 700,000 records with 82 columns.

Currently, I'm fetching the data via an AJAX call but that seems to be limited to 1000 records. I've tried using a simple table with the growing="true" and a defined growingThreshold, but I’ve noticed that the “Load More” feature only paginates locally, using the initially fetched data. It doesn't trigger a new call to the backend, which is what I need.

This would be just the first step. After implementing this incremental loading, I will also need to apply filters on columns and these filters will need to be included in the request URL.

What would be the best approach overall? I considered adding a "Load More" button (instead of relying on the default one provided by the table via growing="true") and handling the pagination manually (implementing my own logic), appending data to the table, and managing skip/top values myself. Is there a better approach for this?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: In UI5 planning calendar appointments date is showing one day before
entry.content:
HI Team,

I am Working on one requirement, but here in sap ui5 planning calendar control appointment is showing one day before.

Please let me know how to resolve this error.

Regards,

Preeti

entry.title: Issue in enabling the Horizontal scrollbar in the Sap Smart table
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I got a requirement to enable the horizontal scrollbar for the smart table and columns & values should not wrap inside the smart table ? 

Can someone suggest how can i achieve it ? tableType of the smart table is "Table".

I have tried keeping the smart table inside the scroll container but nothing happening but when i keep the table which is inside the Smart table in scroll container its coming as below

Please can someone throw light on this.
